login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to get started
login.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to the authentication service. Please try again.

connectSteam.title: Connect your Steam account
connectSteam.bodyIntro: You're almost done. To use the tournament platform with this account (for example after signing in with Discord, Keycloak, or GitHub), you need to link a Steam profile.
connectSteam.bodyRequirement: Linking Steam lets the system recognize you as a player and is required to sign in from non‑Steam providers.

notRegistered.title: You are not registered
notRegistered.description: You've signed in with Steam, but you're not in the players list yet. Ask an admin to add you. Until then, you can only view players and leaderboards.
notRegistered.signInFirst: Sign in with Steam to continue. If you're not in the players list yet, you'll see a message asking you to contact your admin.
